name: com.archerstudio.sdk.core
description: Core foundation for ArcherStudioSDK: initialization orchestration, dependency graph, event bus, configuration, logging, and base utilities.

samples.description: Runtime debug & test UI overlay. Test buttons for all SDK modules with on-screen log viewer. Toggle with F12 (desktop) or 3-finger tap (mobile).
Complete code examples: SDK lifecycle, consent, tracking (all event types), ads, user profile, EventBus custom events, and game integration patterns.
